title: Dental impression tray and dental impression kit
abstract: A dental impression tray made from a polymeric material is specifically designed for use with an elastomeric impression material.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A dental impression tray, characterized in that the dental impression tray is made from a transparent polymeric material. 2. A dental impression tray according to claim 1, characterized in that the dental impression tray has an optical transmission of > 60 % , > 70 % , > 80 % or > 90 % for wavelengths in the range of 380 to 780 nm . 3. A dental impression tray according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that 30 to 100 % of an inner surface of the dental impression tray has an average surface roughness Rz of 2 to 500 Î¼Î·Î¹ . 4. A dental impression tray according to any one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the dental impression tray has an outer side wall that is partly or over its entire extent inwardly inclined. 5. A dental impression tray according to any one of claims 1 to 4, characterized in that the dental impression tray has an inner side wall that is partly or over its entire extent outwardly inclined. 6. A dental impression tray according to any one of claims 1 to 5, characterized in that an outer edge of the dental impression tray is provided with an inwardly protruding bulge extending over select portions or the entire length of the outer edge. 7. A dental impression tray according to any one of claims 1 to 6, characterized in that an inner edge of the dental impression tray is provided with an outwardly protruding bulge extending over select portions or the entire length of the inner edge. 8. A dental impression tray according to any one of claims 1 to 7, characterized in that an inner surface of the dental impression tray has protrusions with a height of 0.2 to 3.0 mm . 9. A dental impression tray according to any one of claims 1 to 8, characterized in that the dental impression tray is made from a transparent polymer having a refractive index n t with 1.3 < n t < 1.6 for wavelengths in the range of 380 to 780 nm . 10. A dental impression kit comprising a dental impression tray according to any one of claims 1 to 9 and an elastomeric impression material. 11. A dental impression kit according to claim 10, characterized in that the elastomeric impression material is an RTV silicone based material. 12. A dental impression kit according to claim 10 or 11, characterized in that the elastomeric impression material is a one component vulcanizable silicone based material. 13. A dental impression kit according to any one of claims 10 to 12, characterized in that the elastomeric impression material is transparent and has an optical transmission of > 60 % , > 70 % , > 80 % or > 90 % for wavelengths in the range of 380 to 780 nm at an optical path length of 3 mm. 14. A dental impression kit according to any one of claims 10 to 13, characterized in that the elastomeric impression material has a refractive index n s with 1.38 < n s < .58 for wavelengths in the range of 380 to 780 nm . 15. A dental impression kit according to any one of claims 10 to 14, characterized in that the refractive index n s of the elastomeric impression material and the refractive index n t of the dental impression tray are matched, such that that -0.2 < n s - n t < 0.2 or that -0.15 < n s - n t < 0.15 for wavelengths in the range of 380 to 780 nm . 16. A dental impression kit according to any one of claims 10 to 15, characterized in that the dental impression kit comprises a cartridge or plastic pouch containing the elastomeric impression material.
